title: Oleksandr Zaitsev | Computer Science Researcher
description: Personal website of Oleksandr Zaitsev: publications, projects, blog, CV, and academic profile.
intro: I work on computational tools and participatory approaches for studying socio-ecological systems, with a particular interest in simulation, serious games, and scientific software as research infrastructure.

profileSummary.focus: Participatory modelling, agent-based modelling, serious games, and software engineering for scientific tools
profileSummary.software: Cormas and related research software ecosystems
profileSummary.service: Publications, supervision, scientific collaborations, and community leadership
profileSummary.collaboration: Interdisciplinary work across computer science, modelling, and environmental research
